title: ilex nubicola
intro: Ilex nubicola, also known as the cloud holly or mountain holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aquifoliaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia, particularly in China and India. Ilex nubicola is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
